---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new ACS cleaning feature or supported format
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Feature

What would you like the tool to support?

## Why Is This Needed?

Describe the ACS format, workflow, or user need.

## Example

Please provide a small synthetic example if possible.

## Privacy Checklist

- [ ] I did not upload real participant data.
- [ ] I removed or replaced participant tokens, dates, answers, and other sensitive values.
